scripts.format: prettier --write . && conda run -n pkos-api ruff format apps/api
scripts.format:check: prettier --check . && conda run -n pkos-api ruff format --check apps/api
scripts.lint: eslint . && conda run -n pkos-api ruff check apps/api
scripts.lint:fix: eslint . --fix && conda run -n pkos-api ruff check --fix apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/desktop run typecheck && npm --workspace @pkos/shared run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
